name: Confidentiality
title: Confidentiality (2.9.1 - 1.0.0)
description: HL7-defined code system of concepts specifying the confidentiality for the shipment.  Used in HL7 Version 2.x messaging in the SHP segment.

property.description: version when was this code introduced
version when was this code deprecated
A code that indicates the status of the concept. Typical values are active, experimental, deprecated, and retired
A string that provides additional detail pertinent to the use or understanding of the concept

concept.display: Business - Since the service class can represent knowledge structures that may be considered a trade or business secret, there is sometimes (though rarely) the need to flag those items as of business level confidentiality.  However, no patient related inf
concept.definition: Business – Since the service class can represent knowledge structures that may be considered a trade or business secret, there is sometimes (though rarely) the need to flag those items as of business level confidentiality.  However, no patient related information may ever be of this confidentiality level.

concept.display: Celebrity - Celebrities are people of public interest (VIP) including employees, whose information require special protection.
concept.definition: Celebrity - Celebrities are people of public interest (VIP) including employees, whose information require special protection.

concept.display: Clinician - Only clinicians may see this item, billing and administration persons can not access this item without special permission.
concept.definition: Clinician - Only clinicians may see this item, billing and administration persons can not access this item without special permission.

concept.display: Substance abuse related - Alcohol/drug-abuse related item
concept.definition: Substance abuse related - Alcohol/drug-abuse related item

concept.display: HIV Related - HIV and AIDS related item
concept.definition: HIV Related - HIV and AIDS related item

concept.display: Individual - Access only to individual persons who are mentioned explicitly as actors of this service and whose actor type warrants that access (cf. to actor typed code).
concept.definition: Individual - Access only to individual persons who are mentioned explicitly as actors of this service and whose actor type warrants that access (cf. to actor typed code).

concept.display: Low - No patient record item can be of low confidentiality.  However, some service objects are not patient related and therefore may have low confidentiality.
concept.definition: Low - No patient record item can be of low confidentiality.  However, some service objects are not patient related and therefore may have low confidentiality.

concept.display: Normal - Normal confidentiality rules (according to good health care practice) apply, that is, only authorized individuals with a legitimate medical or business need may access this item.
concept.definition: Normal - Normal confidentiality rules (according to good health care practice) apply, that is, only authorized individuals with a legitimate medical or business need may access this item.

concept.display: Restricted - Restricted access, e.g. only to providers having a current care relationship to the patient.
concept.definition: Restricted - Restricted access, e.g. only to providers having a current care relationship to the patient.

concept.display: Sensitive - Information for which the patient seeks heightened confidentiality.  Sensitive information is not to be shared with family members.  Information reported by the patient about family members is sensitive by default.  Flag can be set or cleared
concept.definition: Sensitive – Information for which the patient seeks heightened confidentiality.  Sensitive information is not to be shared with family members.  Information reported by the patient about family members is sensitive by default.  Flag can be set or cleared on patient's request.

concept.display: Sexual and domestic violence related - Sexual assault / domestic violence related item
concept.definition: Sexual and domestic violence related - Sexual assault / domestic violence related item

concept.display: Taboo - Information not to be disclosed or discussed with patient except through physician assigned to patient in this case.  This is usually a temporary constraint only; example use is a new fatal diagnosis or finding, such as malignancy or HIV.
concept.definition: Taboo - Information not to be disclosed or discussed with patient except through physician assigned to patient in this case.  This is usually a temporary constraint only; example use is a new fatal diagnosis or finding, such as malignancy or HIV.

concept.display: Very restricted - Very restricted access as declared by the Privacy Officer of the record holder.
concept.definition: Very restricted - Very restricted access as declared by the Privacy Officer of the record holder.
